text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...So that's why King made all these<n>flashy plans, huh? To get people<n>cheering louder at the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Yeah. She has a vision. She wants her<n>cheers to encourage all the<n>competitors at every event.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Plus...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Guess what, King! I jumped 3cm<n>farther than yesterday! That's a new<n>record for me! I'm feeling confident<n>I'll win at the real event!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: She's prepared to do anything for her<n>admiring fan, who also happens to be<n>my precious roommate.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: So that's why I don't think King<n>would turn to me if she ever needed<n>help.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah... You mean because...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Heh. I don't think she'd want to risk<n>her biggest fan hearing anything even<n>slightly uncool about her.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: So if she gets too caught up in doing<n>things her own way, it's up to you to<n>show her a new perspective. All<n>right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Awww, why me?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: We have a special cheer practice<n>today. At the real Fan Fest, the squad<n>will be cheering alongside huge<n>crowds of visitors, and we have to<n>make it a grand success.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's why we've been granted this<n>opportunity. With permission from the<n>academy, we get to invite fans to join<n>us and practice like it's the real<n>event.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Uh, excuse me. Do you know which<n>way it is to get to the track?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh! You must be here for the practice<n>session! I'll take you right there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: (We only get to hold two of these<n>practice sessions. I have to work<n>everything out perfectly during<n>practice so that on the big day...)

text_block_list.name: Fans at the Fan Fest
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! Tracen! Fight, fight,<n>Umamusume! Go!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You truly are a first-rate cheer<n>captain! Thanks to you, I got first<n>place and totally smashed the Tracen<n>Academy record!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heh heh, I will make sure it's an<n>undeniable success!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Ooh, so this is where the practice<n>session is going on. I've got to cheer<n>loud enough to match the girls!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I brought along the megaphone<n>I used last year! I hope our cheers<n>will be as great as last year's!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Looks like everyone is here! In that<n>case, let's get right into it. Get your<n>cheer on so everything's perfect for<n>the big day! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Whoa, the music is booming! Wait...<n>That person on the trumpet—haven't I<n>seen them on TV?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! I hired a first-rate brass<n>band for the occasion! Whatever it<n>takes, there's no stop I won't pull<n>out!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, everyone! Cheer loud, cheer<n>proud, and have some fun! I grant<n>you all the right to match my<n>enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There she goes again...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: After putting in all this effort, there's<n>no way it could go wrong! From the<n>very first practice to the big day,<n>we're guaranteed to be a hit every<n>time!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Everyone, let's try one more time<n>with the trumpet! Aaand—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Bmm ba bmm, bmm bmm ba ba,bidi badadum!)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ahhh...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Um, were we all chanting in time?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... kind of?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, you were all great! Those were<n>some fiery cheers! Ohohoho! I've still<n>got lots more tricks up my sleeve!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So... off I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whistle...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That sure is a lot of pretty balloons<n>you sent up into the sky...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's not a cheer without<n>balloons—that's what I saw online!<n>Doesn't this make you all want to<n>shout out loud?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Go ahead, feel free to shout out your<n>encouragement! Go for it!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: G... go for it?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's it! Go—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let's take a break here. I know you<n>want to do your best, but you've<n>been shouting at full volume this<n>whole time...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No, I can't. Look, they're not excited<n>at all! As the leader, I have to take<n>charge and get everyone fired up!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where you going? Wait, King?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on?! A spotlight?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Everyone, let's get into the groove!<n>Come on, put your hands up!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaa?! You were hiding another<n>one of your crazy ideas from us?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: HEEEEEY! Loud noise and light<n>pollution are PROHIBITED!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad and Fans
text_block_list.text: Thanks for today. Thank you. Thanks<n>for having us.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: That was... a bit of a mess.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Well, it was only the first session...<n>Hope it goes better on the big day...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hi, King. Good work today. Are we<n>going ahead with tonight's practice?<n>I'm happy to help iron out any kinks!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, um...

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I messed up the choreo andthe chant...

text_block_list.name: Squad Member C
text_block_list.text: We've got a regular practice session<n>tomorrow, too. Let's make sure we<n>rest up properly for it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...No, let's cancel. I imagine we're all<n>tired from dealing with so many<n>people today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Next time for sure, let's get it right!<n>Well, see you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: So if she gets too caught up in doing<n>things her own way, it's up to you to<n>show her a new perspective. All<n>right? ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: If it went like that at the real event...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The cheers are... dreadfully lacking!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ahh... I see how it is. No one wants to<n>support me. I feel kind of... weak...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No, King! You promised yourself<n>you'd make the cheers a success!<n>You can't lose hope after just one or<n>two failures!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I have to lead the crowd better. I have<n>to step up and cheer in a way that will<n>stir everyone around me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's it! I'll get an electric display<n>board! That way I can show everyone<n>when to chant! Then with the music...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Out on a night walk too?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Nature?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Why don't we walk together for a<n>bit? I could do with the change of<n>pace too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Come on, King.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let's go see things from another<n>perspective.
